title: Sideyy Boost
description: This is Sideyy's personal fps + basic utility modpack . You can use this to increase your fps .
body:
This custom FPS Boost Modpack is designed to maximize Minecraft’s performance and deliver smooth gameplay even on low-end PCs. It includes carefully selected mods and settings that reduce lag, increase frame rates, and optimize resource usage for Minecraft 1.21 (or your supported version). Perfect for players who want a lag-free, fast, and enjoyable Minecraft experience!

**How to install in game ?**
- Search "Mrpack to Zip" on your browser and convert this file to zip then just copy past all the files in <.minecraft> folder

**SEO :**
